description_long: This bench consists of three individual seating units arranged in a row, each separated by a central divider. The seats and dividers have a modern, boxy design with flat, rectangular surfaces and sharp edges. The seating surfaces and dividers appear to be made of a wood-like material with a warm brown finish, while the base and sides are constructed from a darker, likely metallic or composite material. Each seat is flanked by armrests and a backrest, providing comfort and support for users. The overall structure is low to the ground and appears robust, suitable for high-traffic urban environments. The design suggests it is intended for public spaces such as parks, plazas, or transit stations.
description: A modern, three-unit bench with wood-finished seats, dark dividers, and integrated backrests and armrests, designed for public urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three distinct seating units with visible backrests and armrests, separated by dark dividers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular profile of the bench and the thickness of the seat and divider materials.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the backrests and armrests of each seat clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid, blocky construction of the bench.
attribute_leg_design: solid rectangular base with no visible individual legs
